Student Life & Campus Activities Department Events Calendar

Join Our Upcoming Events and Activities Happening Across All Campus Locations Throughout the Academic Year

From career fairs to late-night study breaks, there’s always something happening on campus. We host hundreds of events each year spanning academic, social, athletic, and cultural activities designed to enrich the student experience and build community connections that last a lifetime.
